name: K-51
events: 28 Nov 1944 K-51 sunk with gunfire the fishing boat Sollind (260 BRT) (1)
1 Dec 1944 K-51 sunk with gunfire the fishing boat Saar(235 BRT) (1)
12 Jan 1945 K-51 sunk with gunfire the Swedish fishing boat Ib(15tons) (1)
28 Jan 1945 K-51 torpedoed and sank the Danish merchant Viborg (2028 BRT) south of Bornholm in position 54°26'N, 16°20'E.
